input_message: Can you help me understand how reservations work?

retrieval.kb_query: Can you help me understand how reservations work?

articles.query: Can you help me understand how reservations work?

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.title: QR Code Not Displaying for Reservation
articles.content: If a user cannot see the QR code for an upcoming reservation, ask them to refresh the reservation page, confirm the booking is still active, and log out and back in to the app. Also suggest updating the app to the latest version. If the QR code still does not appear, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Try refreshing the reservation page or logging out and back in. If the QR code still does not appear, please contact support for further help."
articles.tags: technical issue, qr code, reservation, app

articles.title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
articles.content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

resolution.customer_message: Reservations work by allowing you to book events through the app. You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app or looking for a confirmation email. If you need more details, feel free to ask!

retrieval.kb_query: How do I cancel my reservation?

articles.query: How do I cancel my reservation?

articles.title: Membership Access After Cancellation
articles.content: If a user asks whether they can still use CultPass after canceling, explain that access usually remains active until the end of the current billing cycle unless otherwise stated in their plan terms. Encourage them to review their subscription details in 'Manage Plan'. Suggested phrasing: "After cancellation, access usually continues until the end of your current billing period. You can review your plan details in 'Manage Plan' for confirmation."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

input_message: How do I make a booking?

retrieval.kb_query: How do I make a booking?

articles.query: How do I make a booking?

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.title: QR Code Not Displaying for Reservation
articles.content: If a user cannot see the QR code for an upcoming reservation, ask them to refresh the reservation page, confirm the booking is still active, and log out and back in to the app. Also suggest updating the app to the latest version. If the QR code still does not appear, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Try refreshing the reservation page or logging out and back in. If the QR code still does not appear, please contact support for further help."
articles.tags: technical issue, qr code, reservation, app

articles.title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
articles.content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

input_message: I was charged twice for the same reservation and want a refund.

retrieval.kb_query: I was charged twice for the same reservation and want a refund.

articles.query: I was charged twice for the same reservation and want a refund.

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Payment Method
articles.content: If a user needs to change their payment method, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Billing' > 'Update Payment Method'. They should enter the new payment details and save the changes before exiting. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your payment details anytime in the app under 'My Account' and 'Billing'. Just select 'Update Payment Method' and save your changes."

articles.title: Payment Failed During Subscription Renewal
articles.content: If a user's subscription renewal payment fails, ask them to confirm their card details are correct, check whether the card has expired, and verify that sufficient funds are available. Suggest retrying after a few minutes. If the issue continues, recommend contacting their bank and then support if needed. Suggested phrasing: "Please confirm your card details and make sure your payment method is active. If the issue continues after retrying, your bank may be able to provide more information."

articles.title: Refund Requests for Missed Events
articles.content: If a user asks for a refund after missing an event, explain that refund eligibility depends on the event's cancellation and attendance policy. Ask them to review the event terms and contact support if they believe an exception applies. Suggested phrasing: "Refund eligibility for missed events depends on the event policy. Please review the event terms, and if you believe an exception applies, contact support for further review."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

input_message: There is a charge on my account I do not recognize.

retrieval.kb_query: There is a charge on my account I do not recognize.

articles.query: There is a charge on my account I do not recognize.

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Payment Method
articles.content: If a user needs to change their payment method, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Billing' > 'Update Payment Method'. They should enter the new payment details and save the changes before exiting. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your payment details anytime in the app under 'My Account' and 'Billing'. Just select 'Update Payment Method' and save your changes."

articles.title: Payment Failed During Subscription Renewal
articles.content: If a user's subscription renewal payment fails, ask them to confirm their card details are correct, check whether the card has expired, and verify that sufficient funds are available. Suggest retrying after a few minutes. If the issue continues, recommend contacting their bank and then support if needed. Suggested phrasing: "Please confirm your card details and make sure your payment method is active. If the issue continues after retrying, your bank may be able to provide more information."

articles.title: Refund Requests for Missed Events
articles.content: If a user asks for a refund after missing an event, explain that refund eligibility depends on the event's cancellation and attendance policy. Ask them to review the event terms and contact support if they believe an exception applies. Suggested phrasing: "Refund eligibility for missed events depends on the event policy. Please review the event terms, and if you believe an exception applies, contact support for further review."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

resolution.customer_message: It seems there is an unrecognized charge on your account. This issue requires further investigation by our support team. Please reach out to them for assistance.

final_action.final_response: This issue already has an open escalation, so it will continue with human support.

articles.query: My account is locked and I cannot sign in.

articles.title: How to Reset a Forgotten Password
articles.content: If a user forgot their password, direct them to the login screen in the CultPass app or website and ask them to select 'Forgot Password'. They should enter their registered email address and follow the reset link sent to their inbox. If they do not receive the email, ask them to check spam or junk folders before escalating. Suggested phrasing: "You can reset your password from the login screen by selecting 'Forgot Password' and following the instructions sent to your email."

articles.title: How to Handle Login Issues?
articles.content:
Most login issues are resolved with password reset:

- Ask the user to tap 'Forgot Password' on the login screen
- Ensure they are using the correct registered email
- If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes
- For persistent login issues, escalate to human support

**Suggested phrasing:**
"Try tapping 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Make sure you're using the email associated with your account. If the email doesn't arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes."

articles.title: How to Change the Email on an Account
articles.content: If a user wants to update their email address, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Profile Settings' > 'Edit Email'. They may need to verify the new email address before the change is completed. If they no longer have access to the old email, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your email in the app under 'My Account' and 'Profile Settings'. If verification is required, please follow the instructions sent to your new email."

articles.title: Unable to Log In After Multiple Attempts
articles.content: If a user cannot log in after several attempts, ask them to verify their email and password, use the 'Forgot Password' option if needed, and make sure they are signing in with the correct account. If they still cannot access their account after resetting the password, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Please double-check your login details or use the 'Forgot Password' option. If you still cannot sign in after resetting your password, support can help investigate."

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

input_message: It says my account is blocked. How do I get access back?

retrieval.kb_query: It says my account is blocked. How do I get access back?

articles.query: It says my account is blocked. How do I get access back?

articles.title: How to Change the Email on an Account
articles.content: If a user wants to update their email address, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Profile Settings' > 'Edit Email'. They may need to verify the new email address before the change is completed. If they no longer have access to the old email, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your email in the app under 'My Account' and 'Profile Settings'. If verification is required, please follow the instructions sent to your new email."

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Change Notification Preferences
articles.content: If a user wants to manage notifications, direct them to 'My Account' > 'Notification Settings' in the CultPass app. From there, they can enable or disable reminders, promotions, and event alerts. Suggested phrasing: "You can manage your notification preferences in the app under 'My Account' and 'Notification Settings'. There you can choose which alerts you would like to receive."

articles.title: How to Update Personal Profile Information
articles.content: If a user notices incorrect personal details on their account, direct them to 'My Account' > 'Profile Settings', where they can update editable fields. If a field cannot be changed manually, escalate the issue to human support. Suggested phrasing: "You can update most personal details in the app under 'My Account' and 'Profile Settings'. If a field cannot be edited, support can help."

articles.title: How to Reset a Forgotten Password
articles.content: If a user forgot their password, direct them to the login screen in the CultPass app or website and ask them to select 'Forgot Password'. They should enter their registered email address and follow the reset link sent to their inbox. If they do not receive the email, ask them to check spam or junk folders before escalating. Suggested phrasing: "You can reset your password from the login screen by selecting 'Forgot Password' and following the instructions sent to your email."

final_action.final_response: This issue already has an open escalation, so it will continue with human support.

input_message: How can I reschedule my reservation?

retrieval.kb_query: How can I reschedule my reservation?

articles.query: How can I reschedule my reservation?

articles.title: How to Change the Email on an Account
articles.content: If a user wants to update their email address, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Profile Settings' > 'Edit Email'. They may need to verify the new email address before the change is completed. If they no longer have access to the old email, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your email in the app under 'My Account' and 'Profile Settings'. If verification is required, please follow the instructions sent to your new email."

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to Change Notification Preferences
articles.content: If a user wants to manage notifications, direct them to 'My Account' > 'Notification Settings' in the CultPass app. From there, they can enable or disable reminders, promotions, and event alerts. Suggested phrasing: "You can manage your notification preferences in the app under 'My Account' and 'Notification Settings'. There you can choose which alerts you would like to receive."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.query: Why was I charged a no-show fee?

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Payment Method
articles.content: If a user needs to change their payment method, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Billing' > 'Update Payment Method'. They should enter the new payment details and save the changes before exiting. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your payment details anytime in the app under 'My Account' and 'Billing'. Just select 'Update Payment Method' and save your changes."

articles.title: Payment Failed During Subscription Renewal
articles.content: If a user's subscription renewal payment fails, ask them to confirm their card details are correct, check whether the card has expired, and verify that sufficient funds are available. Suggest retrying after a few minutes. If the issue continues, recommend contacting their bank and then support if needed. Suggested phrasing: "Please confirm your card details and make sure your payment method is active. If the issue continues after retrying, your bank may be able to provide more information."

articles.title: Refund Requests for Missed Events
articles.content: If a user asks for a refund after missing an event, explain that refund eligibility depends on the event's cancellation and attendance policy. Ask them to review the event terms and contact support if they believe an exception applies. Suggested phrasing: "Refund eligibility for missed events depends on the event policy. Please review the event terms, and if you believe an exception applies, contact support for further review."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

input_message: I still need help with the billing problem I reported earlier.

retrieval.kb_query: I still need help with the billing problem I reported earlier.

articles.query: I still need help with the billing problem I reported earlier.

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Payment Method
articles.content: If a user needs to change their payment method, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Billing' > 'Update Payment Method'. They should enter the new payment details and save the changes before exiting. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your payment details anytime in the app under 'My Account' and 'Billing'. Just select 'Update Payment Method' and save your changes."

articles.title: Payment Failed During Subscription Renewal
articles.content: If a user's subscription renewal payment fails, ask them to confirm their card details are correct, check whether the card has expired, and verify that sufficient funds are available. Suggest retrying after a few minutes. If the issue continues, recommend contacting their bank and then support if needed. Suggested phrasing: "Please confirm your card details and make sure your payment method is active. If the issue continues after retrying, your bank may be able to provide more information."

articles.title: Refund Requests for Missed Events
articles.content: If a user asks for a refund after missing an event, explain that refund eligibility depends on the event's cancellation and attendance policy. Ask them to review the event terms and contact support if they believe an exception applies. Suggested phrasing: "Refund eligibility for missed events depends on the event policy. Please review the event terms, and if you believe an exception applies, contact support for further review."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."

articles.query: I need help changing my reservation.

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.title: QR Code Not Displaying for Reservation
articles.content: If a user cannot see the QR code for an upcoming reservation, ask them to refresh the reservation page, confirm the booking is still active, and log out and back in to the app. Also suggest updating the app to the latest version. If the QR code still does not appear, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Try refreshing the reservation page or logging out and back in. If the QR code still does not appear, please contact support for further help."
articles.tags: technical issue, qr code, reservation, app

articles.title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
articles.content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

articles.title: How to Contact Human Support
articles.content: If a user needs help beyond standard guidance, direct them to the support section in the CultPass app or website. Encourage them to include screenshots, booking details, and any relevant error messages when contacting support. Suggested phrasing: "If you need additional help, please contact our support team through the app's support section and include any relevant details or screenshots."

articles.title: App Crashes on Launch
articles.content: If a user reports that the CultPass app crashes immediately after opening, ask them to fully close and reopen the app, confirm they are using the latest version, and restart their device. If the issue continues, suggest reinstalling the app. If the crash persists after reinstalling, escalate the issue to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Please try closing and reopening the app, make sure it is updated to the latest version, and restart your device. If the issue continues, reinstalling the app may help."
articles.tags: technical issue, app crash, troubleshooting, mobile

articles.title: QR Code Not Displaying for Reservation
articles.content: If a user cannot see the QR code for an upcoming reservation, ask them to refresh the reservation page, confirm the booking is still active, and log out and back in to the app. Also suggest updating the app to the latest version. If the QR code still does not appear, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Try refreshing the reservation page or logging out and back in. If the QR code still does not appear, please contact support for further help."
articles.tags: technical issue, qr code, reservation, app

articles.title: Unable to Log In After Multiple Attempts
articles.content: If a user cannot log in after several attempts, ask them to verify their email and password, use the 'Forgot Password' option if needed, and make sure they are signing in with the correct account. If they still cannot access their account after resetting the password, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Please double-check your login details or use the 'Forgot Password' option. If you still cannot sign in after resetting your password, support can help investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Personal Profile Information
articles.content: If a user notices incorrect personal details on their account, direct them to 'My Account' > 'Profile Settings', where they can update editable fields. If a field cannot be changed manually, escalate the issue to human support. Suggested phrasing: "You can update most personal details in the app under 'My Account' and 'Profile Settings'. If a field cannot be edited, support can help."

resolution.customer_message: I see you need help, but I need more details about your issue to assist you better. Please provide more information.

final_action.final_response: I wasn’t able to safely resolve this automatically, so I created a support escalation for human review.

input_message: How do I change my booking date?

retrieval.kb_query: How do I change my booking date?

articles.query: How do I change my booking date?

articles.title: How to Confirm a Reservation Was Successful
articles.content: If a user is unsure whether their booking went through, ask them to check 'My Reservations' in the app and confirm whether the event appears with its details. They may also receive a confirmation email for some bookings. Suggested phrasing: "You can confirm your reservation by checking 'My Reservations' in the app. If the event appears there, your booking was successful."

articles.title: How to View Upcoming Reservations
articles.content: If a user wants to see their booked events, direct them to open the CultPass app and go to 'My Reservations'. Upcoming experiences should be listed with the date, time, and QR code if available. Suggested phrasing: "You can view all your upcoming reservations in the app under 'My Reservations', where you will also find your event details and QR codes."

articles.title: How to Cancel an Event Reservation
articles.content: If a user needs to cancel a reservation, ask them to open 'My Reservations' in the app, select the event they want to cancel, and tap 'Cancel Reservation'. Remind them that some events may have cancellation deadlines or restrictions. Suggested phrasing: "You can cancel a reservation from the 'My Reservations' section of the app. Please note that some events may have cancellation deadlines."

articles.title: QR Code Not Displaying for Reservation
articles.content: If a user cannot see the QR code for an upcoming reservation, ask them to refresh the reservation page, confirm the booking is still active, and log out and back in to the app. Also suggest updating the app to the latest version. If the QR code still does not appear, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: "Try refreshing the reservation page or logging out and back in. If the QR code still does not appear, please contact support for further help."
articles.tags: technical issue, qr code, reservation, app

articles.title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
articles.content:
If a user asks how to reserve an event:

- Guide them to the CultPass app
- Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap 'Reserve'
- If it's a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email
- Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping 'Reserve'. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready."

retrieval.kb_query: My account is locked and I also need a refund for an incorrect charge.

articles.query: My account is locked and I also need a refund for an incorrect charge.

articles.title: Duplicate Charge on Account
articles.content: If a user reports being charged twice, acknowledge the concern and ask them to verify the transaction dates and amounts. Explain that temporary bank authorizations can sometimes appear as duplicate charges. If both charges remain posted after the pending period, escalate the case to human support for review. Suggested phrasing: "Sometimes a temporary bank authorization can look like a duplicate charge. If both charges remain posted, please contact support so we can investigate."

articles.title: How to Update Payment Method
articles.content: If a user needs to change their payment method, direct them to the CultPass app and ask them to go to 'My Account' > 'Billing' > 'Update Payment Method'. They should enter the new payment details and save the changes before exiting. Suggested phrasing: "You can update your payment details anytime in the app under 'My Account' and 'Billing'. Just select 'Update Payment Method' and save your changes."

articles.title: Payment Failed During Subscription Renewal
articles.content: If a user's subscription renewal payment fails, ask them to confirm their card details are correct, check whether the card has expired, and verify that sufficient funds are available. Suggest retrying after a few minutes. If the issue continues, recommend contacting their bank and then support if needed. Suggested phrasing: "Please confirm your card details and make sure your payment method is active. If the issue continues after retrying, your bank may be able to provide more information."

articles.title: Refund Requests for Missed Events
articles.content: If a user asks for a refund after missing an event, explain that refund eligibility depends on the event's cancellation and attendance policy. Ask them to review the event terms and contact support if they believe an exception applies. Suggested phrasing: "Refund eligibility for missed events depends on the event policy. Please review the event terms, and if you believe an exception applies, contact support for further review."

articles.title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
articles.content:
Users can manage their subscription via the app > 'My Account' > 'Manage Plan'.

- Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle
- Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated
- Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead

**Suggested phrasing:**
"You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the 'My Account' section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle."
